title: rhodanthe polycephala
intro: Rhodanthe polycephala, also known as the Billy Button, is a small, shrub-like annual plant native to Australia. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Rhodanthe polycephala can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
